title: SetState
text: SetState Writes state information to the USTATE table. "USYSSTAT".SetState ( SesstionId , $instancename , SessionData ) Table 1. Parameters Parameter Type Direction Value SesstionId string IN Generated by Uniface, and accessible using $webinfo("WEBSERVERCONTEXT"), SESSION . $instancename string IN Name of the server page component instance, returned by $instancename . SessionData string IN Uniface list of component variables. Example: SetState The default code of the postActivate trigger of dynamic and static server pages activates the SetState operation to store state-related information from component variables into the USTATE table: Explain this code variables string WebServerCntxt, SessionId, Varlist endvariables WebServerCntxt = $webinfo("WEBSERVERCONTEXT") getitem/id SessionId, WebServerCntxt, "SESSION" Varlist = $componentinfo($componentname, "VARIABLES") putlistitems/id /component Varlist activate "USYSSTAT".SetState(SessionId, $instancename, Varlist) Copy Related Links $webinfo ("WebServerContext") The WebServerContext topic contains an associative list of properties that provide state information about the Uniface Server and the context in which it is running. $instancename Return the name of the current component instance.
